calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rita Howell.
John Zaghi, Esq. for Plaintiff: John Stewart Company, a California Corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Tessa Reed, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: James Watson and George Anderson.
Exh. 1 - Lease Agreement-----------------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 2 - Threeday Notice-----------------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 3 - Two Proof of Service------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: James Watson and George Anderson as follows:
Restitution and possession of the property located at 390 Clementina St., #609, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Back-Rents and Damages $561.00
Costs $340.00, for a Total of $901.00
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John P. Zanghi, Esq for Plaintiff John Stewart Company
No appearance by Defendant James Watson

Settlement conference is off calendar. No appearance by Defendant. Trial date is maintained. Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk Melinka Jones & Greg Chuck, not reported (218)
